summary.para: Create an inference endpoint to perform an inference task with the mistral service.
The chunking configuration object. Applies only to the text_embedding task type. Not applicable to the completion or chat_completion task types.
The unique identifier of the inference endpoint.
The type of service supported for the specified task type. In this case, mistral.
Settings used to install the inference model. These settings are specific to the mistral service.
The type of the inference task that the model will perform.
Specifies the amount of time to wait for the inference endpoint to be created.
